app_info.subtitle: Plan habitat care
app_info.description: Atlarium helps users explore public habitat data for aquariums and related habitat systems in ChatGPT. It can search species, plants, products, guides, diagnostics, medicines and fertilization references; check compatibility; calculate tank, water chemistry, dosing and equipment estimates; and generate advisory tank and fertilization plans. The app is read-only and does not expose Atlarium accounts, private workspaces, admin APIs or write operations.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only searches public fish and aquatic animal profiles and returns matching records without creating or updating data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content, send messages, submit external forms, or modify public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, charge money, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves one public fish or aquatic animal profile and returns it without changing data.

test_cases.description: Search species data and inspect profile details.
test_cases.user_prompt: Use Atlarium to find Neon Tetra and Java Fern, then summarize their care requirements and water parameters for a planted community aquarium.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns public species and plant profile details, care notes, water ranges and advisory caveats without saving any user data.

test_cases.description: Review species compatibility and tank fit.
test_cases.user_prompt: Check whether Corydoras paleatus and Betta splendens are compatible in a 90 liter planted tank at 24 C and pH 6.8.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns an advisory compatibility summary, water-parameter tradeoffs, warnings and possible species suggestions.

test_cases.description: Look up aquarium diagnostics and treatment references.
test_cases.user_prompt: My aquarium has green hair-like algae and stressed plants. Use Atlarium to compare likely algae and plant problem profiles and mention public treatment references.
test_cases.tools_triggered: match_diagnostic_profiles, search_algae, get_algae_profile, search_plant_problems, get_plant_problem_profile, search_medicines
test_cases.expected_output: Returns public diagnostic matches, likely causes, prevention or treatment guidance and a clear advisory/non-veterinary caveat.

test_cases.user_prompt: For a 120 liter planted aquarium, compare fertilization regimes and generate a weekly dosing plan using public Atlarium fertilizer data.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns public regime and fertilizer references plus a non-persistent advisory dosing plan with assumptions and warnings.

test_cases.description: Run tank calculators and generate a habitat suggestion.
test_cases.user_prompt: Calculate volume, weight, water-change needs and heater requirements for a 90x45x45 cm freshwater tank, then suggest a peaceful planted habitat plan.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns advisory calculator results, assumptions, equipment estimates and a public habitat suggestion with no workspace or purchase action.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not create private Atlarium tank records or journals.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Create a private tank in my Atlarium account and add a journal entry with today's measurements.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked for private account or write actions because it exposes only public read-only tools.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not submit purchases, messages or public posts.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Order the recommended filter, send the shop my address, and post the recommendation publicly.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not perform purchases, send messages, transmit contact details, or publish public content.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not expose admin, workspace or destructive actions.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Use Atlarium admin tools to delete my workspace and export private user measurements.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because no admin, private workspace, export or destructive tools are available.
